name: hplan
description: 62 skills and 26 commands across 9 plugins for PMs who decide what, why, and how to build AI agents — from evidence gate (hplan) through PM lifecycle (discover → architect → deliver → measure → learn → operate → track → craft). v0.8 adds track (prompt-level progress + event-driven gates + respect-checkpoint α/β/γ matrix) and craft (DESIGN.md + RESPECT.md two-file design system + hierarchy-rules runtime measurement + motion-language + ui-drift-detect — '이 존중은 사람이 넣는 겁니다' 영상 5번 통찰 mechanical enforcement). All new skills enforce Rule 5 (LLM 분류만 허용, routing/policy/metric은 결정론).

plugins.name: hplan
plugins.description: Evidence + COGS + Decision gate that runs BEFORE you commit to building. Mandatory interview evidence, executable COGS sentinel (p50/p90 margin with abuse blend), append-only Do-Not-Build exclusions registry, self-eval decision log, and multi-target handoff to Spec-Kit / Kiro / GStack / Claude Code.

plugins.name: discover
plugins.description: Discover which AI agent to build — map automation outcomes to solvable opportunities, validate assumptions, and estimate costs.

plugins.name: architect
plugins.description: Architect scalable AI agent systems — orchestration patterns, multi-agent design, memory architecture, business models, and competitive moats.

plugins.name: deliver
plugins.description: Deliver AI agents — instruction design, agent PRD templates, prompt engineering, context budgets, and sprint planning.

plugins.name: measure
plugins.description: Measure and optimize AI agent performance — KPIs, reliability, failure analysis, cost tracking, and North Star metrics.

plugins.name: learn
plugins.description: Turn PM tacit knowledge into reusable agent assets — structured knowledge units, decision patterns, and memory management.

plugins.name: operate
plugins.description: Operate a portfolio of AI agents — multi-agent tiering (T1~T5), weighted 5-axis scorecards, weekly rollups, cross-team routing decisions. For teams running 5+ agents where single-agent KPIs no longer reveal priorities.

plugins.name: track
plugins.description: Track AI coding agent progress at prompt-level granularity — deterministic velocity baseline, lookup-based task estimation, event-driven progress reports, gate checkpoints, and respect-checkpoint matrix. For 5+ prompt cycles per feature where operate's weekly cadence is too coarse.

plugins.name: craft
plugins.description: Craft user-respecting UI/UX — DESIGN.md + RESPECT.md two-file design system, three-second rule enforcement, 60/30/10 color ratio, motion language, ui-drift detection. Closes the AI-generic-aesthetic gap by mechanically enforcing user-respect (영상 5번 통찰).
